name: research-team
summary: Research-first team for broad, source-heavy, or ambiguous problems that need evidence before planning.

roles.name: research-scout
roles.responsibility: Gather the minimum useful source set from local context and primary sources.
roles.stop_condition: The important source surface is covered and obvious dead ends are excluded.

roles.name: source-triager
roles.responsibility: Sort findings into confirmed facts, conflicts, and uncertainty.
roles.stop_condition: A planner can see what is true, what is disputed, and what still needs verification.

roles.name: evidence-packager
roles.responsibility: Compress research into a reusable evidence pack without narrative bloat.
roles.stop_condition: A downstream planner can work from the artifact without re-reading the source hunt.

collapse_condition: The question has one or two known sources and no conflicting evidence — a single worker can research and package in one pass.
escalate_condition: Source surface is broad, conflicting, or spans multiple domains. Multiple search passes are needed before triaging is possible.

primitives: delegated runtime agents when source volume is high
